code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    print("none")
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut has = false
    mut maxv = 0
    mut start = 0
    mut in_tok = false
    while i < n + 1
      mut is_ws = true
      if i < n
        match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(b)
          if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
            is_ws = true
          else
            is_ws = false
          end
        when None
          is_ws = true
        end
      end
      if is_ws
        if in_tok
          let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            if v > 0
              if not has
                maxv = v
                has = true
              else if v > maxv
                maxv = v
              end
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          in_tok = false
        end
      else
        if not in_tok
          start = i
          in_tok = true
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if has
      print("max=#{maxv}")
    else
      print("none")
    end
  end
end
